response.justification: Candidate has strong full-stack and polyglot engineering experience but lacks the core requirements for this role. There is no recent or substantial C++ development experience (only a brief 7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no Windows platform focus, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background. The profile is heavily oriented toward web/Node.js/DLang work, which does not align with this C++ capital markets role.
strengths: Broad software engineering experience across multiple domains and stacks
Strong testing/TDD discipline and software craftsmanship background
Excellent written communication, demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: Minimal C++ experience (~7 months, over 10 years ago) — far below the required 5-10 years
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle or Windows platform development experience

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows platform background
